name: Teads
description: Global omnichannel video advertising platform for mobile web, in-app and CTV, part of Outbrain Teads.

seo.title: Teads — Ad Monetization / Mediation
seo.meta_description: Teads: Global omnichannel video advertising platform for mobile web, in-app and CTV, part of Outbrain Teads.

when_to_use: Mobile web video ads with high viewability for brand campaigns
In-app and CTV omnichannel video for premium publishers
Brand-safe outstream video monetization for mobile publishers

pros: Premium video demand across mobile web and app
cons: Mobile web stronger than in-app SDK
review.verdict: Premium brand video SSP best for mobile web, weaker as a pure in-app app monetization choice.
review.best_for: Content publishers monetizing mobile web video with brand-safe premium demand.
review.not_for: Mobile game developers seeking performance-driven rewarded or interstitial fill.
